name: Frosted Brownies
recipeInstructions:
In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, cornstarch, baking powder, baking soda, and salt until blended. In a separate bowl, stir together the egg whites, evaporated skim milk, applesauce, corn syrup, and vanilla. Add the dry mixture to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8x8x2 inch baking pan with cooking spray.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 30-35 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
5. To prepare the icing, blend all ingredients in a medium bowl until smooth. Spread the icing over the cooled brownies and serve.
